plan.failureSummary: The test failed in DETERMINISTIC mode because the cached selector for 'Last Name' could not be found. The failure screenshot reveals the form has changed to 'Set 2', which uses a 'Your Name' field instead of 'Last Name'.
observedIndicators: Failure screenshot shows 'Your Name' field while tool call attempted 'Last Name' field from cache
UI contains a 'Set 2' badge, indicating dynamic form content
History shows a pattern of alternating success and failure, typical of environmental or structural flakiness in cached runs

remediationSteps.summary: Clear the page.ai cache and retry the test.
remediationSteps.details: Set clearPageAiCache to true and retry the test. This will allow the autonomous agent to re-analyze the current form structure and generate fresh, valid instructions for 'Set 2'.

remediationSteps.summary: Consider disabling DETERMINISTIC mode if the UI rotates frequently.
remediationSteps.details: If the survey structure is intentionally unstable, consider disabling deterministic mode for this specific test or increasing the retry count to handle different UI variants.

plan.notes: This is a clear case of a stale cache. The application (unstable-survey) appears to rotate through different form versions. The deterministic cache was recorded on a version with a 'Last Name' field, but the current run encountered a version with a 'Your Name' field. Since the page.ai instruction is semantically flexible ('Fill out all of the survey questions'), clearing the cache and allowing a fresh autonomous run will resolve the issue.
